recommendation_context: review filters and execution thresholds because the runner is failing to convert opportunities
improve model quality and data coverage before promoting this family
tighten entry logic and retrain for better trade selection quality

maintenance_request.reason: Paper evidence for `binance_funding_contrarian:challenger:1` is blocked and uncompetitive. Reproducible evidence: 58 settled trades over 29 paper days, monthly ROI `-1.3246%`, net PnL `-203.79`, failure rate `1.0`, slippage headroom `-4.0379%`, regime robustness `0.275`, zero baseline-beaten windows, and hard vetoes on `failure_rate_above_15pct`, `negative_slippage_stress`, and `regime_robustness_below_minimum`. Additional artifact evidence shows the latest refresh failed, the run fell back to `naive_contrarian_backtest`, and produced `dataset_rows=0`, so some of the latest weakness is entangled with execution/data failure rather than clean alpha-only evidence. Inference: the family shows repeated structural weakness plus recurring execution/gating fragility, so this lineage should be replaced in active rotation, but not retired outright yet.

retrain.target_objective: reduce missed settlement windows while improving strict-gate pass rate on funding dislocations
